channel.title: Talk About Frontity in Meetup SP - Brazil
channel.description:
Hello people. I did a talk on how to start using Frontity in your WordPress projects, what you need to know, what advantages and etc ... Hope you like it :)
Video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y4tA2A24lA0
Slides https://drive.google.com/file/d/1rkamUzH5OfuSV6RoxUKmETZ0jsG2P02l/view?usp=sharing

item.title: Talk About Frontity in Meetup SP - Brazil
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
Hello Digo!

Thank you very much for your contribution I’m really happy to see Frontity Framework being present in new countries, and on top of that, being explained directly by their local communities.

Read full topic
item.source: Talk About Frontity in Meetup SP - Brazil

item.title: Talk About Frontity in Meetup SP - Brazil
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Hi Digo!

Welcome to the community.

Many thanks for introducing Frontity at the WordCamp São Paulo meetup and for sharing these resources with us!

I’m sure they will be very helpful for other users in the Portuguese community who want to know more about Frontity or host another meetup.

Read full topic
item.source: Talk About Frontity in Meetup SP - Brazil

item.description:
Hello people.
I did a talk on how to start using Frontity in your WordPress projects, what you need to know, what advantages and etc …
Hope you like it

Meetup online: Um novo jeito de criar temas no WordPress com o Frontity
